revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:医師による健康診断盗撮事件]]
'''Ishi ni yoru Kenkōshindan Tōsatsu Jiken''' (医師による健康診断盗撮事件) refers to incidents in which a [[:en:Physician|Physician]] secretly filmed patients during {{ill|Health Examination|de|Gesundheitsuntersuchung|ja|健康診断|zh|健康检查|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Health Examination|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Diagnostic test|qid=Q1762591}} procedures.
== Case Examples ==
=== Fukushima Prefectural Medical University === From autumn 2015 through 2016, a 28-year-old male physician affiliated with {{ill|Fukushima Medical University|en|Fukushima Medical University|qid=Q595437|lt=Fukushima Prefectural Medical University|1=Fukushima Medical University}} conducted secret filming during health examinations at hospitals across Fukushima Prefecture.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.nishinippon.co.jp/item/o/284772/ |title=「盗撮数百回」医師を解雇 福島県立医大 |accessdate=2022-11-17 |date=2022-10-26 |website=西日本新聞}}</ref> He used a {{ill|Subminiature photography|en|Subminiature photography|qid=Q3277847|lt=Pen Camera|1=Subminiature photography}} hidden in his shirt pocket to film women’s chests. He also filmed nursing staff and patients inside and outside hospital buildings, reportedly committing hundreds of offenses.
=== Matsubara City === Between November 2016 and June 2017, a 49-year-old male physician in {{ill|Matsubara City, Osaka Prefecture|de|Stadt Matsubara, Präfektur Osaka|ja|大阪府松原市|zh|大阪府松原市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsubara City, Osaka Prefecture|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} secretly filmed women during health and {{ill|Breast Cancer Screening|de|Brustkrebsvorsorge|ja|乳癌検診|zh|乳腺癌筛查|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Breast Cancer Screening|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} examinations using his {{ill|Smartphone|en|Smartphone|qid=Q22645|lt=Smartphone|1=Smartphone}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.nikkansports.com/general/nikkan/news/1884079.html |title=大阪49歳医師スマホで検診女性を盗撮 逮捕送検 |accessdate=2022-11-17 |date=2017-09-07 |website=日刊スポーツ}}</ref> He was also found to have molested unconscious female patients brought in drunk, constituting additional offenses.
=== Okayama City === In May 2021, a 47-year-old male physician in {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|qid=Q200078|lt=Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture|1=Okayama}} filmed 26 female elementary and middle school students—either topless or in their underwear—during school health examinations using a pen camera.<ref name="NHK_20221115"/><ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.asahi.co.jp/webnews/pages/abc_17200.html |title=「歪んだ性癖を児童に向けた」 小中学校で健康診断中に女子生徒・児童26人盗撮 47歳元開業医に執行猶予付き有罪判決 |accessdate=2022-11-17 |date=2022-11-15 |website=ABCニュース}}</ref> He was convicted under Okayama Prefecture’s {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|1=Anti-Nuisance Ordinance|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11639203}} and the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童ポルノ禁止法|zh|儿童色情禁止法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Child Pornography Prohibition Act|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|1=Child pornography laws in Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4251291}}. In November 2022, the Kyoto District Court sentenced him to 2 years 6 months imprisonment, suspended for 4 years.<ref name="NHK_20221115"/>
=== Kōfu City === In November 2021 and June 2022, a 32-year-old male physician in {{ill|Kōfu|en|Kōfu|qid=Q201932|lt=Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Kōfu}} filmed women’s underwear with his smartphone during health examinations, resulting in charges under Yamanashi Prefecture’s nuisance ordinance and related laws.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/-/184547 |title=健康診断中に女性の下着姿を盗撮 初公判で被告の医師が認める 検察「8台のスマホを持ち、動画保存」 |accessdate=2022-11-17 |date=2022-10-21 |website=TBS NEWS DIG}}</ref> He had also committed prior voyeurism offenses in 2017 at Yamagata Station and Yamagata Prefectural Central Hospital.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www3.nhk.or.jp/lnews/yamagata/6024126951.html |title=盗撮疑いの医師 職場でも盗撮か |accessdate=2022-11-17 |date=2017-09-21 |website=NHK NEWS WEB}}</ref>
=== Nishinomiya City === From March to April 2022, a 34-year-old male physician in {{ill|Nishinomiya|en|Nishinomiya|qid=Q243853|lt=Nishinomiya City, Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Nishinomiya}} filmed at least 30 female junior and senior high school students—topless—during school health examinations in Osaka and Hyōgo Prefectures using mobile phones and pen cameras. He was arrested in June 2022 and charged under the Child Pornography Prohibition Act when evidence was discovered on seized devices.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.asahi.com/articles/ASQCS5JJ2QCSPTIL00P.html |title=学校の健康診断中、女子中高校生14人を盗撮容疑 34歳医師を逮捕 |accessdate=2022-11-24 |date=2022-11-24 |website=朝日新聞}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.ktv.jp/news/articles/?id=03252 |title=健康診断中に女子生徒の上半身盗撮の医師 ペン型カメラで盗撮 |accessdate=2022-12-13 |date=2022-12-13 |website=関西テレビ放送 カンテレ}}</ref>
== Response ==
=== Civic Movements === A campaign demanding improvements to school health examination methods has gained momentum. In October 2022, {{ill|Nagaokakyō City, Kyoto Prefecture|de|Stadt Nagaokakyō, Präfektur Kyoto|ja|京都府長岡京市|zh|长冈京市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaokakyō City, Kyoto Prefecture|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} established the “Association for Safe Health Examinations for Children,” initiating a petition for clothed examinations.<ref name="mainichi_20221113"/><ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.change.org/p/厚生労働省-子どもたちを強制的に裸にしないで-本人の同意を大事にした健康診断を実施してください |title=キャンペーン・子どもたちを強制的に裸にしないで！本人の同意を大事にした健康診断を実施してください |accessdate=2022-11-17 |website=Change.org}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.fnn.jp/articles/-/445692 |title=「裸にしないで」着衣での健康診断求める署名活動 小中学校で広がる |accessdate=2022-11-17 |date=2022-11-16 |website=FNNプライムオンライン}}</ref> By November 15, 2022, over 26,000 supporters had signed.
=== Government Measures === In March 2021, the {{ill|Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology|en|Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology|qid=Q1054379|lt=Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology|1=Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology}} issued guidance requesting that schools obtain prior consent from students and guardians, and ensure privacy within the limits of medical necessity.<ref name="mainichi_20221113"/> However, there is no unified national rule, and MEXT has stated that methods vary by school physician and that “prior explanation to guardians and obtaining their understanding is important.”<ref name="nagaokakyo"/>
=== Measures to Avoid Topless Examinations === Some schools permit students to wear medical {{ill|Bra|en|Bra|qid=Q13716|lt=Bra|1=Bra}} or equivalent undergarments (excluding sports bras) during examinations<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.kakogawa.lg.jp/material/files/group/90/20220519kyouiku01.pdf |title=各学校における内科健診時の服装について |publisher=加古川市教育委員会 |date=2022-05-19 |accessdate=2024-05-25}}</ref>, or to use towels (e.g., apron-style or wrap towels) or capes to cover themselves.<ref name="nagaokakyo"/>
== Similar Cases ==
=== Johns Hopkins Hospital === In 2013, a male physician at {{ill|Johns Hopkins Hospital|en|Johns Hopkins Hospital|qid=Q1472068|lt=Johns Hopkins Hospital|1=Johns Hopkins Hospital}} was found to have secretly filmed thousands of obstetrics-gynecology patients with a pen camera and other devices, victimizing approximately 8,000 people. He was dismissed in February 2013 and died by suicide 10 days later. In July 2014, the hospital agreed to a US $190 million settlement.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.cnn.co.jp/usa/35051174.html |title=婦人科医が患者盗撮、8千人と190億円で和解 米病院 |accessdate=2022-11-17 |date=2014-07-22 |website=CNN}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://sfspa.com/verdicts-settlements/leading-the-190-million-settlement-of-the-dr-nikita-levy-case/ |title=Leading the $190 Million Settlement of the Dr. Nikita Levy Case |accessdate=2022-11-17 |website=Schochor and Staton, P.A.}}</ref>
=== Maebashi City === In September 2018, a 49-year-old male physician in {{ill|Maebashi|en|Maebashi|qid=Q201613|lt=Maebashi City, Gunma Prefecture|1=Maebashi}} committed indecent acts—pressing a stethoscope on the chests of four female employees—at a company health examination in {{ill|Ōta, Gunma|en|Ōta, Gunma|qid=Q386179|lt=Ōta City|1=Ōta, Gunma}}. He was convicted of quasi-forced indecent assault and in December 2021 received a 2 years 6 months sentence, suspended for 4 years.<ref name="yomiuri20211202"/><ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.jomo-news.co.jp/articles/-/135108 |title=健診わいせつ行為 医師の控訴を棄却 東京高裁 |accessdate=2022-11-18 |date=2022-06-25 |website=上毛新聞}}</ref>
=== Kyoto Prefectural University of Medicine Hospital === Between June 2020 and November 2021, a 44-year-old male physician at {{ill|Kyoto Prefectural University of Medicine Hospital|de|Universitätsklinikum Kyoto|ja|京都府立医科大学附属病院|zh|京都府立医科大学附属医院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoto Prefectural University of Medicine Hospital|1=University Hospital, Kyoto Prefectural University of Medicine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11375231}} secretly filmed seven female patients—including an unconscious 10-year-old girl—under general anesthesia with his smartphone. He was convicted under Kyoto Prefecture’s nuisance ordinance and the Child Pornography Prohibition Act, receiving 2 years 6 months imprisonment, suspended for 5 years in November 2022.<ref name="kyoto20221111"/>
== Footnotes == <references />
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Human Rights Issues in Physical Examinations|de|Menschenrechtliche Fragen bei Körperuntersuchungen|ja|身体検査における人権問題|zh|身体检查中的人权问题|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Human Rights Issues in Physical Examinations|qq=}} * {{ill|Medical ethics|en|Medical ethics|qid=Q237151|lt=Medical Ethics|1=Medical ethics}} * {{ill|Informed consent|en|Informed consent|qid=Q764527|lt=Informed Consent|1=Informed consent}} * {{ill|Paternalism|en|Paternalism|qid=Q58434|lt=Paternalism|1=Paternalism}} * {{ill|Health Examination|de|Gesundheitsuntersuchung|ja|健康診断|zh|健康检查|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Health Examination|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Diagnostic test|qid=Q1762591}} * {{ill|Secret photography|en|Secret photography|qid=Q840241|lt=Voyeurism|1=Secret photography}}
=== Voyeurism Incidents === * {{ill|Quasi-Forced Indecent Assault Incident by a Doctor at Tokyo Metropolitan Bokutō Hospital|de|Vorfall sexueller Nötigung durch Arzt im Tokyo Metropolitan Bokutō Hospital|ja|東京都立墨東病院#問題となった事件・不祥事|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Bokutoh Hospital|lt=Sexual assault incident at Tokyo Metropolitan Bokuto Hospital|zh|东京都立墨东医院医生准备强制猥亵事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Quasi-Forced Indecent Assault Incident by a Doctor at Tokyo Metropolitan Bokutō Hospital|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Bokuto Hospital#sexual assault incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11525433}} * {{ill|Japan Airlines Flight 1402 Cabin Crew Skirt Voyeurism Incident|de|Japan Airlines Flug 1402 Skirt-Voyeurismusvorfall|ja|日本航空1402便客室乗務員スカート内盗撮事件|zh|日本航空1402航班乘务员裙内偷拍事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japan Airlines Flight 1402 Cabin Crew Skirt Voyeurism Incident|1=Japan Airlines 1402 Flight Attendant Skirt Voyeurism Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17212912}} * {{ill|Athlete Voyeurism|de|Sexueller Bildskandal bei Sportlern|ja|アスリートの性的画像問題|zh|运动员性图片问题|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Athlete Voyeurism|qq=}} * {{ill|Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths|de|Organisierter Voyeurismus-Vorfall in Freiluftbädern|ja|露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件|1=Organized Voyeurism Scandal at Outdoor hot spring baths|zh|露天浴中的组织偷窥事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths|13=User:Immanuelle/Organized Voyeurism Scandal at Outdoor hot spring baths|qq=}}
=== Sex Crimes During Medical Procedures === * {{ill|Cosmetic Surgery Indecent Assault Incident|de|Sexueller Übergriff eines Schönheitschirurgen|ja|美容整形外科医わいせつ事件|zh|整形美容外科医生猥亵事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cosmetic Surgery Indecent Assault Incident|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|医師による健康診断盗撮事件|version=104551075|comment=Imported full ja history}}
